The '''Battle of the ''Resurgence''''' occurred some time after the end of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], when a group of the [[Alderaanian Resistance]] were escaping from a mission on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].

==The battle==
They were ambushed by a unit of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] under the [[Inquisitorius/Legends|Inquisitorius]]. Their ship, the [[Resurgence (EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate)|''Resurgence'']], was boarded and destroyed; although Inquisitor [[Valin Draco]] took [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Denia]] captive to the [[Citadel Inquisitorius]] on [[Prakith/Legends|Prakith]], most of the rest of the rebels managed to escape through [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] to [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]].
